home.serv1Desc: Configure the funeral online. Instant quote, no obligation.
home.serv2Desc: International transport of remains to and from any country in the world.
home.serv3Desc: A dignified farewell for your lifelong companion.
home.serv4Desc: Transfer of remains, relocation and cremation of remains.
home.serv5Desc: Coffins, urns, flowers, hearses and additional services.
home.serv6Desc: Total transparency. Compare costs by province.
home.test1Testo: In such a difficult moment, being able to organise everything online was essential. The consultant supported us with extraordinary care.
home.test2Testo: Total transparency on prices, no surprises. They guided us from the first phone call to the ceremony.
home.test3Testo: The online memorial for our father is a wonderful gift. Relatives from all over the world were able to leave a message.
home.faq1R: No, the quote is purely indicative and does not constitute a contractual offer. The final price is agreed with the consultant.
home.faq2D: How quickly will I be contacted?
home.faq2R: One of our consultants will contact you within 30 minutes of submitting your request, 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.
home.faq3R: We operate throughout Campania and for repatriations/expatriations worldwide.
home.faq4D: Can I modify the service after the request?
home.faq4R: Absolutely yes. The configuration is a starting point; the consultant will personalise everything.
home.faq5R: Yes, we offer individual and collective cremation for dogs, cats and other pets.
home.faq6D: How does the repatriation of remains work?
home.faq6R: We handle everything: documentation, consulates, air transport and delivery. 24/7 assistance.

No contractual obligation arises from the use of this configurator.
configuratore.step8Desc: You are requesting information about the service you have just configured. One of our dedicated consultants will accompany you at every stage, from confirming the details to the complete organization of the service.

catalogo.sottotitolo: All our products and services presented with maximum transparency. Prices are indicative and subject to confirmation.
catalogo.nonTrovate: Can't find what you're looking for? Our complete catalogue is available on request.

chiSiamo.sottotitolo: For over thirty years at the side of Campanian families, with professionalism, respect and dedication at every moment.
chiSiamo.storiaP1: Since 1920, our family has devoted itself with passion and dedication to accompanying families through life's most delicate moments. Over a century of experience, passed down from generation to generation, has taught us that every person deserves a final farewell made of respect, dignity and care in every detail.
chiSiamo.storiaP2: Our funeral home, regularly registered in the Campania Regional Register, offers a complete 360-degree service: from dressing the deceased to mortuary cosmetics, from organizing religious or civil ceremonies to handling all bureaucratic procedures, from choosing flowers and decorations to printing funeral notices and memorial cards.
chiSiamo.storiaP3: We have a modern and welcoming funeral home, equipped with rooms for laying out the deceased, a ceremony hall with capacity for up to 100 seats, and a large showroom where families can view coffins, urns and floral arrangements in a serene and private environment.
chiSiamo.storiaP4: We are the first digital funeral agency in Italy: our online configurator allows you to personalize every aspect of the service and receive an indicative quote in just a few minutes, without pressure and without obligation. A dedicated consultant contacts you within 30 minutes to accompany you throughout the entire process.
chiSiamo.storiaP5: We operate throughout Campania — Naples, Caserta, Salerno, Avellino and Benevento — and handle repatriation and expatriation of remains worldwide, with complete consular and documentary assistance. We also offer pet cremation services, exhumation and reexhumation, and an online memorial with QR Code for the headstone.
chiSiamo.registroRegionaleDesc: Registered in the Regional Register of funeral companies in Campania (D.G.R. 732/2017)
chiSiamo.conformitaNormativaDesc: Operating in full compliance with L.R. 12/2001 and D.P.R. 285/1990
chiSiamo.formazioneContinuaDesc: Qualified staff kept up to date on regulations and best practices in the sector
chiSiamo.coperturaRegionaleDesc: Service active throughout Campania with facilities in Naples and the surrounding area
chiSiamo.cosaDareTitolo: What to do in the event of a death
chiSiamo.cosaDareDesc: A practical guide to navigate the first moments, step by step.
chiSiamo.step1Desc: The attending physician or 118 will need to certify the death and issue the death certificate.
chiSiamo.step2Desc: Call us at any time at 081 555 1234. We will take care of everything, including the transport of the deceased.
chiSiamo.step3Desc: The deceased's ID card, health card, death certificate. We will take care of everything else.
chiSiamo.step4Desc: Together we will define the type of ceremony, the coffin, the flowers and every detail. You can use our online configurator.
chiSiamo.step5Desc: We handle the death registration, transportation authorization and cemetery procedures.
chiSiamo.step6Desc: We organize and coordinate the entire ceremony according to your wishes.

contatti.sottotitolo: We are always available. Do not hesitate to contact us for any need.
contatti.messaggioInviatoDesc: We will reply as soon as possible. Thank you for contacting us.
contatti.gdprConsento: I consent to the processing of personal data pursuant to the GDPR. *

cremazioneAnimali.sottotitolo: A dignified farewell for your four-legged friend. Respectful and professional service throughout Campania.
cremazioneAnimali.intro: We know how painful it is to lose a life companion. That is why we offer a cremation service dedicated to pets, with the same care and respect we reserve for people.
cremazioneAnimali.cremIndividualeCanePiccolaDesc: Up to 10 kg. Ashes returned in urn.
cremazioneAnimali.cremIndividualeCaneMedaDesc: From 10 to 25 kg. Ashes returned in urn.
cremazioneAnimali.cremIndividualeCanGrandeDesc: Over 25 kg. Ashes returned in urn.
cremazioneAnimali.cremCollettivaDesc: Without return of ashes. Scattering in a dedicated area.
cremazioneAnimali.ritiroDomicilioDesc: Collection of your pet from your home.
cremazioneAnimali.urnaCommemorativaDesc: Wide selection of urns in ceramic, wood and marble.
cremazioneAnimali.comeProcedereDesc: Contact us by phone or WhatsApp. We will arrange the collection of your pet and accompany you through every stage with gentleness and respect.

esumazione.sottotitolo: Complete service for exhumation, reexhumation, transfer of remains and cremation. Assistance with all administrative procedures in Campania.
esumazione.esumazioneOrdinariaDesc: At the end of the cemetery concession (generally after 10-30 years).
esumazione.esumazioneStaordinariaDesc: Before the end of the concession, at the request of the family or authority.
esumazione.riesumazioneDaLocoloDesc: Removal of the coffin from a niche for transfer or cremation.
esumazione.cremazioneRestiDesc: Cremation of bone remains after exhumation.
esumazione.trasferimentoAltroCimiteroDesc: Transportation of remains to a different cemetery, even outside the province.
esumazione.ricollocazioneLocoloDesc: Placement of remains in a new niche, ossuary or family chapel.
esumazione.assistenzaPraticheDesc: Complete management of authorizations with the Municipality, ASL and cemetery.

prezzi.sottotitolo: Full transparency on costs. Compare average prices by province and get a personalized quote with our configurator.
prezzi.notaLegale: The prices shown are indicative and based on market averages in Campania. They do not constitute a contractual offer. The final quote is agreed with the consultant.
prezzi.preventivoPersonalizzatoTitolo: Would you like a personalized quote?
prezzi.preventivoPersonalizzatoDesc: Use the configurator for a detailed line-by-line quote, free and with no obligation.

rimpatri.sottotitolo: International transportation of remains to and from any country in the world. Complete assistance with documentation, consular procedures and logistics.
rimpatri.rimpatrioItaliaDesc: Did your loved one pass away abroad? We take care of everything: from collecting the remains in the foreign country to delivery in Italy.
rimpatri.rimpatrioItalia3: Air transport with zinc-lined IATA coffin
rimpatri.espatrioItaliaDesc: A foreign citizen has passed away in Italy and the family wishes to repatriate the body? We manage the transportation to any destination.
rimpatri.espatrioItalia1: Procedures with ASL and Italian Municipality
rimpatri.espatrioItalia4: Handover to funeral home in destination country
rimpatri.step01Desc: Call 24/7. We gather all the necessary information about the place of death and the destination.
rimpatri.step02Desc: We handle the death certificate, mortuary passport, translation, legalization and consular authorizations.
rimpatri.step03Desc: Preservation treatment (thanatopraxy), zinc-lined coffin compliant with IATA standards for international air transport.
rimpatri.step04Desc: Coordination with airlines, customs, departure and arrival airports. Real-time tracking.
rimpatri.step05Desc: Reception in the destination country with a local funeral home. Assistance through to burial.
rimpatri.costiZonaNota: Prices vary based on distance, country and required procedures.
rimpatri.doc7: Passport or ID of the deceased
rimpatri.documentiNota: We take care of all the documentation. You won't have to worry about anything.
rimpatri.ctaTitolo: Do you need an urgent repatriation?
rimpatri.ctaDesc: We operate 24 hours a day to handle urgent repatriations worldwide. A specialized consultant will follow you through every stage.

previdenza.badgeFondi: Protected funds in a separate dedicated account
previdenza.sottotitolo: Configure the funeral service for yourself or a family member, lock in the price and pay comfortably in monthly installments. When the time comes, everything will already be arranged.
previdenza.simulatoreTitolo: How much does it cost per month?
previdenza.simulatoreDesc: Simulate the monthly cost of a complete funeral service
previdenza.esempiServizio: Example of a complete funeral service
previdenza.cf1Desc: Choose every detail of the service: coffin, flowers, ceremony, transport.
previdenza.cf2Desc: From 12 to 60 monthly installments. Price locked in forever.
previdenza.cf3Desc: Automatic monthly charge to your card or bank account.
previdenza.cf4Desc: When the time comes, everything is already arranged and paid for.
previdenza.fondiProtettiDesc: Payments are deposited in a dedicated and separate bank account, protected from seizure. Refundable at any time.
previdenza.prezzoBloccatoDesc: The price you configure today remains unchanged for the entire duration of the plan, regardless of inflation.
previdenza.trasferibleDesc: The plan can be transferred to another family member or modified at any time at no additional cost.
previdenza.dirittoDiRecessoDesc: You can cancel the plan at any time. Within 14 days: full refund. After 14 days: refund of the amount paid minus 5% administrative fees.
previdenza.perVoiDesc: Decide today how you want to be remembered, without leaving the burden of choices and expenses to your loved ones.
previdenza.perVoi1: Choose every detail at your own pace
previdenza.perVoi3: Your family won't have to decide anything
previdenza.perVoi4: You can change your choices at any time
previdenza.perFamiliareDesc: Arrange in advance for an elderly parent or family member, guaranteeing them the service they deserve.
previdenza.perFamiliare2: Perfect for residents of care homes and nursing homes
previdenza.perFamiliare3: No decisions to be made in grief
previdenza.perFamiliare4: The service is guaranteed whatever happens
previdenza.rsaTitolo: Are you a care home or nursing home?
previdenza.rsaDesc: Offer the families of your residents the reassurance of a funeral provident plan. Become a Funerix partner.
previdenza.ctaDesc: Configure the plan in 5 minutes. A consultant will contact you within 30 minutes.

assistenza.sottotitolo: Ask the assistant or contact a consultant directly
assistenza.messaggioIniziale:
Hello, I am the Funerix assistant. How can I help you?

You can ask me questions about costs, documents, cremation, timelines, or any other information.

Or click on one of the frequently asked questions below.
assistenza.rispostaDefault:
I'm sorry, I couldn't find a precise answer to your question. I recommend:

• Using the configurator for a personalized quote
• Contacting us directly by phone
• Messaging us on WhatsApp

A consultant will be happy to help you.
assistenza.contattoDesc: Would you prefer to speak with a consultant? We are available 24/7.
assistenza.faq1Domanda: How much does a funeral cost?
assistenza.faq4Domanda: How long before I am contacted?
assistenza.faq9Domanda: Can I change the service after the request?
assistenza.faq11Domanda: Are you available at night and on public holidays?

memorial.sottotitolo: A space to honour and remember those who are no longer with us. Leave a thought, a condolence or a memory for your loved ones.
memorial.necrologiRecentiDesc: Leave a message of condolence for the deceased assisted by our funeral home.
memorial.comeFunzionaDesc: Every deceased person assisted by our funeral home can have a dedicated memorial page.
memorial.qrCodeDesc: A unique QR code to print on the headstone, memorial card or funeral notice.
memorial.condoglianzeFeatDesc: Anyone can leave a message of condolence, even from afar.
memorial.fotoRicordiDesc: A gallery of images shared by those who knew the deceased.
memorial.donazioniDesc: Option to indicate a charity for donations in memory.
memorial.ctaTitolo: Would you like a memorial for your loved one?
memorial.ctaDesc: The online memorial is included as an additional service in the configurator, or you can request it by contacting us directly.

convenzioni.titolo: Partnerships with Care Homes and Nursing Homes
convenzioni.sottotitolo: Offer the families of your residents the reassurance of an already arranged and paid funeral service. Become a Funerix partner.
convenzioni.perFamiliariDesc: Families configure the plan from the dedicated link of your facility. No cost to the care home.
convenzioni.commissioneDesc: You receive a commission of 5-10% on every plan activated through your partnership.
convenzioni.assistenzaTotaleDesc: Funerix handles everything: configuration, payments, activation. You simply act as the link.
convenzioni.step1Desc: Fill in the membership form. We assign you a unique partnership code and a dedicated link.
convenzioni.step2Desc: Inform the families of your residents about the possibility of activating a Funerix provident plan.
convenzioni.step3Desc: Families access from your link, configure the plan and start paying the installments.
convenzioni.step4Desc: You receive the agreed commission on every plan activated. Transparent monthly report.
convenzioni.step5Desc: When a resident passes away, Funerix activates immediately. Everything is already arranged.
convenzioni.diventaPartnerDesc: Contact us to activate the partnership. We will get back to you within 24 hours.

guida.sottotitolo: Everything you need to know, explained clearly. To help you navigate difficult moments without rush and without pressure.
guida.cosaDareTitolo: What to do in the event of a death
guida.guide1Desc: The first steps when a death occurs at home. Doctor, documents, transport.
guida.guide2Desc: Hospital procedure, mortuary, collection of the deceased and procedures with the facility.
guida.guide3Desc: How to manage a death outside Italy: consulate, repatriation of remains, documents.
guida.guide4Titolo: Death in a care home or nursing home
guida.guide4Desc: Procedure in care facilities and communication with the management.
guida.guideInfo1Titolo: How much does a funeral cost?
guida.guideInfo1Desc: Complete guide to costs: budget, standard, premium. What affects the price.
guida.guideInfo2Desc: Complete list of documents to organize a funeral. What to bring, where to request them.
guida.guideInfo3Desc: Procedure, timelines, costs, crematoria in Campania, choice of urn, scattering of ashes.
guida.guideInfo4Desc: The differences explained: costs, timelines, cemetery concessions, how to choose.
guida.guideInfo5Desc: How to write the notice: text, format, where to post it, printing costs.
guida.guideInfo6Desc: Advance directives, living will, wishes about the ceremony and burial.
guida.guideInfo7Desc: How to cope with grief, psychological support, mutual aid groups in Campania.
guida.guideInfo8Desc: Cremation of dogs, cats and other animals: individual, collective, costs, urns, collection.
guida.nonTrovate: Can't find what you're looking for? We are at your disposal 24/7.

blog.sottotitolo: Useful articles to navigate difficult moments

guidaDecesso.sottotitolo: When death occurs in the home
guidaDecesso.step1Testo: The attending physician or 118 must confirm the death and issue the death certificate. Without this document no further steps can be taken.
guidaDecesso.step2Testo: Call us at any hour on 081 555 1234. We will immediately take care of the transport of the body and all necessary procedures.
guidaDecesso.step3Testo: The deceased's ID card, health card, death certificate. We will handle everything else: death registration, authorisations, cemetery procedures.
guidaDecesso.step4Testo: Together we will define the type of ceremony, coffin, flowers and every detail. You can use our online configurator or decide with the consultant.
guidaDecesso.step5Testo: We organise and coordinate the entire ceremony according to your wishes. We accompany you through to burial or cremation.

guidaCosti.titolo: How much does a funeral cost?
guidaCosti.sottotitolo: Complete guide to costs in Campania — updated 2026
guidaCosti.economicoTesto: Includes paulownia or fir coffin, standard transport, basic wreath, essential bureaucratic procedures. Suitable for those seeking a dignified service on a limited budget.
guidaCosti.standardTesto: Includes walnut or oak coffin, Mercedes hearse, wreath and floral arrangements, dressing, obituary in local newspaper, funeral notices, full administrative assistance, funeral chapel.
guidaCosti.premiumTesto: Includes premium coffin (mahogany, bronze), full ceremony setup, thanatopraxy, online memorial with QR Code, personalised floral arrangements, total assistance.
guidaCosti.cremazioneTesto: Crematorium fee (€500–€800), cremation coffin, funeral urn (€80–€1,200), transport. Please note crematorium waiting times (10–30 days in Naples).

guidaDocumenti.sottotitolo: Complete list — we take care of everything
guidaDocumenti.noi2: Death registration with the Municipality (within 24 hours)
guidaDocumenti.noi3: Authorisation for transport of the body
guidaDocumenti.temp1: Death registration: within 24 hours of death

onoranzeComune.percheScegliereTitolo: Funeral home in {nome}: why choose Funerix
onoranzeComune.percheScegliere1: Funerix is the first digital funeral agency in Campania. We operate in {nome} and throughout the province of {provincia} offering a complete, transparent and respectful service. Our online configurator lets you personalise every aspect of the funeral service and receive an indicative quote in just a few minutes.
onoranzeComune.percheScegliere2: Unlike traditional funeral homes, with Funerix you can take all the time you need to choose, compare and decide without any pressure. One of our dedicated consultants will contact you within 30 minutes to guide you through every stage.
onoranzeComune.cosaInclude1: Transport of the body from home, hospital or care home in {nome}
onoranzeComune.cosaInclude2: Wide choice of coffins, funeral urns and floral arrangements
onoranzeComune.cosaInclude3: Organisation of religious or secular ceremony
onoranzeComune.cosaInclude4: Funeral chapel at our premises or at home
onoranzeComune.cosaInclude5: Full assistance with administrative and cemetery procedures
onoranzeComune.cosaInclude6: Obituaries in local newspapers and funeral notices
onoranzeComune.cosaInclude7: Online Memorial page with QR Code
onoranzeComune.cosaInclude8: Available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week
onoranzeComune.costoTitolo: How much does a funeral cost in
onoranzeComune.costoDesc: The cost of a funeral in {nome} varies depending on the type of service chosen. A complete funeral with ground burial starts at around €2,500, while a standard service with entombment ranges between €4,000 and €8,000. Cremation costs between €2,000 and €4,500. Use our configurator for a personalised and detailed quote.
onoranzeComune.rispostaIn30Desc: A consultant contacts you within half an hour of your request, 24/7.
onoranzeComune.prezziTrasparentiDesc: Detailed quote item by item. No hidden costs.
onoranzeComune.operiamoDesc: We know the area and the cemeteries of {nome} and the surrounding province.
onoranzeComune.ctaDesc: Configure the service online or contact us directly. We are always by your side.

memorialDettaglio.scrivi: Write a condolence message or share a memory...
memorialDettaglio.qrCodeDesc: Scan to visit this page. Print it on a prayer card or headstone.

cliente.seguitoStato: Here you can follow the status of the service and communicate with your consultant.
cliente.prezzoDefinitoDesc: The final price has been agreed with the consultant and may vary.
cliente.nessunMessaggio: No messages yet. Write to the consultant for any need.
cliente.statoConfermataDesc: The details have been agreed with the consultant
cliente.statoInCorsoDesc: We are organising all aspects of the service
cliente.statoCompletataDesc: The service has been completed with care
cliente.accessoNonAutorizzato: Unauthorised access. Please contact your consultant.
cliente.firmaSalvata: Signature saved successfully. The consultant has been notified.

guidaCremazione.heroSottotitolo: Procedure, costs and timelines in Campania
guidaCremazione.procedura1: Cremation request signed by entitled family members
guidaCremazione.procedura2: Authorisation from the Local Health Authority (ASL)
guidaCremazione.procedura3: Transport of the body to the crematorium
guidaCremazione.procedura5: Delivery of the urn to the family (after 24–48 hours)
guidaCremazione.crematorio1Desc: the main one in the region
guidaCremazione.tempiAttesa: Waiting times: 10–30 days for availability. During the wait the body is kept in a cold storage cell (€30–€80/day).

guidaInumazione.heroSottotitolo: The differences explained — how to choose
guidaInumazione.inumazioneDesc: The coffin is buried in a field of the cemetery. Concession: 10–30 years. Concession cost:
guidaInumazione.inumazioneNote: . At the end, the remains are exhumed and transferred to an ossuary.
guidaInumazione.tulazioneDesc: The coffin is placed in a walled niche in the cemetery wall. Concession: 30–50 years or perpetual. Cost:
guidaInumazione.tulazioneNote: . Also requires a headstone and closure (€500–€2,000).
guidaInumazione.scelta3: Availability: niches are scarce in Naples

guidaManifesto.heroSottotitolo: How to write it, formats, costs and where to post it
guidaManifesto.strutturaDesc: The traditional funeral notice contains: religious symbol (cross), full name of the deceased with any nickname ("known as..."), age, announcement phrase, list of family members, date/place/time of the ceremony, name of the funeral home.
guidaManifesto.doveDesc: Notices are posted on dedicated municipal boards, at the ceremony church, near the deceased's home and at the cemetery. In Campania funeral notices are particularly important and widespread.
guidaManifesto.serviziDesc: With Funerix you can create the notice directly from the private area, choosing from 14 different frames, 8 fonts and customising every detail. The notice can be shared via WhatsApp, email and printed as a PDF.

guidaTestamento.disposizioniDesc: It is possible to leave written instructions on the type of ceremony (religious/secular), cremation or burial, music, flowers, ceremony location. These instructions, even if not legally binding like a will, are generally respected by the family.
guidaTestamento.testamentoBiologicoDesc: Advance Treatment Directives (Law 219/2017) concern medical care, not the funeral ceremony. However, they may include wishes on organ donation.
guidaTestamento.pianificazioneDesc: More and more families choose to plan the funeral service in advance, selecting products and services calmly. Our configurator is the ideal tool for doing so.

guidaLutto.heroSottotitolo: Support and resources for coping with loss
guidaLutto.fasiDesc: The Kübler-Ross model identifies 5 stages: denial, anger, bargaining, depression, acceptance. Not everyone goes through them in the same order, and there is no "right" time to process grief.
guidaLutto.aiuto1: Difficulty carrying out daily activities after months
guidaLutto.aiuto3: Use of alcohol or medication to manage pain
guidaLutto.memorialDesc: Many families find comfort in the online memorial dedicated to their loved one. A space to collect memories, photos and messages from those who care. Discover our memorial service.

guidaAnimali.heroSottotitolo: Complete guide — a dignified farewell for your companion
guidaAnimali.intro: Losing a pet is a profound pain. They are life companions who give us unconditional love for years. They deserve a final farewell of respect and dignity.
guidaAnimali.individualeDesc: Your animal is cremated individually. The ashes are collected and returned to the family in a dedicated urn. You can choose from ceramic, wood or marble urns.
guidaAnimali.collettivaDesc: Multiple animals are cremated together. The ashes are dispersed in a dedicated area. The return of ashes is not provided. Lower cost.
guidaAnimali.passo1Desc: Call or message us on WhatsApp at any hour. We are available at night and on holidays too.
guidaAnimali.passo2Desc: If needed, we come to collect your animal from your home or from the vet.
guidaAnimali.passo3Desc: Together with the consultant, decide on the type of cremation, the urn and additional services.
guidaAnimali.passo4Desc: Cremation takes place in authorised facilities. Timing: 24–72 hours.
guidaAnimali.passo5Desc: For individual cremation, the ashes are returned in the chosen urn.
guidaAnimali.perditaDesc: The pain of losing a pet is real and legitimate. Do not be ashamed to grieve your companion. Many find comfort in keeping the ashes in a special place at home, creating a small memorial with photos and memories, or planting a tree in remembrance. If the pain persists, do not hesitate to talk to someone.
guidaAnimali.leggeDesc: In Italy pet cremation is regulated by EC Regulation 1069/2009 and Legislative Decree 36/2005. Facilities must be authorised by the veterinary health authority. Ashes may be kept at home or dispersed on private land with the owner's consent. Dispersing ashes in public places without authorisation is prohibited.
